component.name: BootDrive
component.summary: Expose a disk image as a bootable USB drive

description.p: BootDrive turns your postmarketOS phone into a bootable USB drive. Select one ISO or raw disk image and expose it to a connected computer as a bootable USB CD-ROM or USB disk, then eject to return to normal USB behaviour.

BootDrive is deliberately small: it exposes exactly one image at a time, always read-only, and relies on a privileged system helper for the low-level USB gadget work so the app itself stays sandboxed.
First release: select one image and expose it as a bootable USB drive.
